artifacts.summary: Diagnosed 3 root causes: generated JSON not excluded, README.md not skipped in scan_directory_for_sync, no per-repo file protection. Proposed index.json exclusion, README skip, and .syncprotect file support.

active_projects.completion_summary: Fixed sync.lua to exclude generated JSON files (index.json), skip README.md in scan_directory_for_sync, and support .syncprotect for per-repo file protection during sync operations.

active_projects.completion_summary: Fixed silent grep pattern failure in update-task-status.sh, created link-artifact-todo.sh to automate four-case TODO.md artifact linking, and updated 7 skill postflights to use the script instead of LLM-dependent Edit logic.

artifacts.summary: Identified two sync mechanisms causing CLAUDE.md overwrites: core sync copies file wholesale, destroying extension-injected sections. Recommends section-marker preservation during sync plus post-sync re-injection of extension merge targets.
3-phase plan: section-aware sync for CLAUDE.md, post-sync extension re-injection, and edge case testing
Implementation summary for section preservation and post-sync re-injection in sync.lua

active_projects.completion_summary: Added two-layer defense to sync.lua: section-aware overwrite preserves extension-injected SECTION blocks in CLAUDE.md/OPENCODE.md, and post-sync re-injection restores all merge targets (settings.json, index.json) for loaded extensions.
